mano_cua.result_summary: 有序列表编号在无序列表后重置为1。创建交替有序/无序列表（First, Anything 1, Second, Anything 2, Third, Anything 3），导出 HTML 后有序编号全为1而非1,2,3。源码确认每个 <ol start="1">，CSS counter-reset 导致计数器重置。编辑器内和导出结果均复现。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Ordered list numbering resets to 1 after each unordered list. Created alternating ol/ul structure, exported HTML shows all ol items as start=1 instead of 1,2,3. Both editor display and HTML export confirm the bug.
